newCourse.title: Create course
newCourse.subtitle: Set up a course before students join.
newCourse.name: Course name
newCourse.descriptionHint: Optional. We'll use this on the course landing card.
newCourse.createError: We couldn't create the course. Please try again.

sessions.title: Session folders
sessions.description: Organized spaces for each week's teaching and materials.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints for each session
checkpoints.description: Automatic learning-check prompts grounded on your materials.

joinCode.title: Hidden course join code
joinCode.description: Stays hidden until you publish the course.

basics.title: Course basics
basics.name: Course name
basics.descriptionHint: Optional. We'll use this on the course landing card.
basics.saveError: We couldn't save course basics. Please try again.

preview.title: What students will see
preview.secretsNote: The class join code stays hidden until you publish.

syllabus.title: Upload your syllabus
syllabus.subtitle: Upload a syllabus (PDF or DOCX). We'll parse it in the background so you can review and apply the schedule, outcomes, and assignments it detects.
syllabus.skip: Skip for now — add a syllabus before publishing
syllabus.continueError: We couldn't save this step. Please try again.
syllabus.applyError: We couldn't apply this syllabus. Please try again.

empty.title: No syllabus uploaded yet
empty.reason: Upload a syllabus above to start the import, or skip this step for now.

parsing.title: Parsing your syllabus…
parsing.reason: This runs in the background. It'll be ready for review shortly.

parsed.title: Syllabus parsed — review and apply
parsed.reason: Applying writes the detected schedule and outcomes into your course.

applied.title: Syllabus applied
applied.reason: The detected schedule and outcomes are now part of your course.

failed.title: We couldn't parse this syllabus
failed.reason: Try uploading a clearer PDF or DOCX, or skip this step for now.

description.title: Draft course description
description.description: We reuse the syllabus overview to draft a course summary.

sessions.title: Create session folders
sessions.description: Detected sessions become organized spaces for each class.

checkpoints.title: Generate initial checkpoints
checkpoints.description: Learning-check prompts grounded on your materials.

materials.title: Upload course materials
materials.subtitle: Add readings, slides, and recordings. We parse and index each file so quizzes, checkpoints, and answers are grounded on your content.
materials.skip: Skip for now — add materials before publishing
materials.continueError: We couldn't save this step. Please try again.

empty.title: No materials uploaded yet
empty.reason: Drag in a PDF, DOCX, PPTX, MP4, or MP3 above, or skip this step for now.

schedule.title: Extract schedule
schedule.description: Detecting weekly sessions and key dates from your files.

outcomes.title: Find course outcomes
outcomes.description: Surfacing the learning outcomes your materials cover.

topics.title: Identify session topics
topics.description: Mapping content to each session for grounded checkpoints.

schedule.title: Schedule & venue
schedule.subtitle: Add each class session with its date, venue, and topic. Meli builds the calendar and grounds session checkpoints on these.
schedule.continueError: We couldn't save this step. Please try again.
schedule.deleteError: We couldn't remove that session. Please try again.
schedule.releaseError: We couldn't update session visibility. Please try again.
schedule.sessionsNote: Folders and checkpoints are created from these sessions after setup.

empty.title: No sessions yet
empty.reason: Add your first class session using the form on the left.

form.indexRequired: Enter a session number of 1 or more.
form.dateRequired: Pick a date and time for this session.
form.saveError: We couldn't save this session. Please try again.

ilo.title: ILO map
ilo.subtitle: Define the intended learning outcomes for this course. Meli maps them to sessions, checkpoints, and practice questions.
ilo.continueError: We couldn't save this step. Please try again.
ilo.deleteError: We couldn't remove that outcome. Please try again.

empty.title: No learning outcomes yet
empty.reason: Add your first intended learning outcome using the form above.

form.statementPlaceholder: e.g. Order food and drinks in Mandarin.
form.saveError: We couldn't save this outcome. Please try again.

sessions.title: Session topics
sessions.description: Outcomes anchor what each session teaches.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoint review points
checkpoints.description: Generated checkpoints check confidence against outcomes.

practice.title: Practice questions
practice.description: Quizzes and flashcards target the outcomes you set.

analyzer.title: Review course context
analyzer.subtitle: Meli reads your materials, sessions, and outcomes to check everything a checkpoint could ground on is in place before you continue.

run.title: Analyze course materials
run.reason: We map your uploaded materials to sessions and learning outcomes, then flag anything that isn't grounded on a source yet.

running.title: Analyzing your course…
running.reason: This runs in the background. Results appear here as soon as it finishes.

ready.title: Everything is grounded
ready.reason: Each session and outcome maps to your course materials. You're ready to continue.

missing.title: {count, plural, one {# item needs a source} other {# items need a source}}
missing.reason: These outcomes or sessions aren't grounded on any material yet. You can continue for now, but publishing is blocked until every source is in place.

analyzer.runError: We couldn't start the analysis. Please try again.
analyzer.continueError: We couldn't save this step. Please try again.

sessions.title: Review sessions
sessions.subtitle: Confirm the sessions generated from your schedule and materials. You can still tweak a topic summary or visibility before approving.
sessions.saveError: We couldn't save that change. Please try again.
sessions.releaseError: We couldn't update session visibility. Please try again.

empty.title: No sessions yet
empty.reason: Go back to the schedule step to add your class sessions.

folders.title: Session folders are created
folders.description: Each session gets an organized space for its materials.

calendar.title: Calendar events are added
calendar.description: Sessions appear on the course calendar for students.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints are drafted
checkpoints.description: Each session gets grounded learning-check prompts to review next.

checkpoints.title: Review checkpoint drafts
checkpoints.subtitle: Meli drafts a checkpoint for each session, grounded on your materials. Review the draft review points and final comments card before continuing. Nothing is shared with students yet.
checkpoints.generateError: We couldn't start checkpoint generation. Please try again.
checkpoints.continueError: We couldn't save this step. Please try again.

draftNotice.title: These checkpoints are drafts
draftNotice.reason: Nothing here is visible to students. Scheduling and sharing checkpoints comes later.

generating.title: Drafting checkpoints…
generating.reason: This runs in the background. Drafts appear here as soon as they're ready.

empty.title: No checkpoints yet
empty.reason: Generate grounded checkpoint drafts for your sessions to review them here.

checkpoints.noCards: This checkpoint has no cards yet.

errors.FINAL_CARD_FIXED: The final comments card cannot be removed.
errors.REVIEW_REQUIRED: This checkpoint can only be edited while it is a draft.
errors.REMOVE_REASON_REQUIRED: Choose a reason before removing this card.
errors.SETUP_INCOMPLETE: Finish every setup step before publishing.
errors.SETUP_NOT_OPEN: This course is not open yet.
errors.generic: We couldn't save that change. Please try again.

aside.title: Confidence scale
aside.description: Students rate their confidence on each review point from 1 to 5.

scorePolicy.title: Score policy
scorePolicy.subtitle: Choose how each kind of Meli activity counts toward the course record. You can rename categories, set a weight, add your own, or remove the ones you don't use.
scorePolicy.weightInvalid: Weight must be a number of 0 or more.
scorePolicy.addError: We couldn't add a category. Please try again.
scorePolicy.saveError: We couldn't save this category. Please try again.
scorePolicy.removeError: We couldn't remove this category. Please try again.
scorePolicy.continueError: We couldn't save this step. Please try again.

empty.title: No score categories yet
empty.reason: Add a category to describe how activities count toward the course record.

grounded.title: Weights shape effort
grounded.description: Categories that count toward the record steer where students spend time.

visible.title: Shown in checklists
visible.description: Students see clearly which activities are graded and which are practice.

flexible.title: Adjust anytime
flexible.description: Rename, reweight, or remove categories as the course evolves.

classCode.title: Course join code
classCode.subtitle: Share this code only when students should join. It stays hidden here until you reveal it.
classCode.loadError: We couldn't load this course's join code. Please try again.
classCode.activeHint: Students who enter this code can join the course.
classCode.inactiveHint: Joining is turned off. Rotate to a fresh code to reopen it.
classCode.copyError: We couldn't copy the code. Reveal it and copy manually.
classCode.rotateError: We couldn't rotate the code. Please try again.
classCode.deactivateError: We couldn't deactivate the code. Please try again.
classCode.continueError: We couldn't save this step. Please try again.

aside.title: Join access
aside.created: This code was created during setup.
aside.share: Students enter this code to access the course.
aside.deactivate: Deactivate it once the students you expected have joined.

stub.title: Reuse a prior term's evidence — coming later
stub.reason: Importing improvement notes, reusable activities, and weak-concept patterns from a previous offering arrives in a later release. This step is optional and never blocks publishing.

wizard.subtitle: Complete each step, then publish to open your course.
wizard.comingSoon: This step opens as setup progresses. Come back once the earlier steps are done.
wizard.loadError: We couldn't load this course's setup. Please try again.

pollTimeout.title: This is taking longer than expected
pollTimeout.reason: The job is still running or may have stalled. You can keep waiting or retry.

review.title: Review setup
review.subtitle: Confirm the course is ready before students join.
review.publishError: We couldn't publish the course. Please try again.

stepDesc.basics: Course name, code, term, and department set.
stepDesc.schedule: Schedule and venue confirmed for every session.
stepDesc.class_code: Join code ready to share with students.

afterPublish.title: What happens after publish
afterPublish.joinCode: Students can join with the class code you share.
afterPublish.calendar: Calendar events appear and the first session unlocks.
afterPublish.materials: First-session materials become available to students.

publishSuccess.title: Course published
publishSuccess.subtitle: {name} is ready for students.
publishSuccess.tagline: Students can now join with the class code.
publishSuccess.footnote: Reopening setup later keeps enrolled students in — it only re-flags artifacts whose sources changed.

missingSource.title: Finish setup before publishing
missingSource.subtitle: Meli needs a few more sources before this course can open.
missingSource.bannerReason: Publishing is blocked until every step below is done.

errors.SETUP_INCOMPLETE: Finish every setup step before publishing.
errors.SETUP_NOT_OPEN: This course is not open yet.
errors.UNKNOWN_STEP: That setup step is not recognized.
errors.FINAL_CARD_FIXED: The final comments card cannot be removed.
errors.REVIEW_REQUIRED: This checkpoint can only be edited while it is a draft.
errors.REMOVE_REASON_REQUIRED: Choose a reason before removing this card.

course.loadError: Refresh the page or return to your courses.

overview.title: Course overview
overview.subtitle: A snapshot of your course, with quick links into setup and sessions.
overview.draftBannerTitle: This course is still in setup
overview.draftBannerReason: Finish and publish setup before students can join.

access.title: Course access
access.subtitle: Share this code so students can join. Manage it in setup.
access.copyError: We couldn't copy the code. Reveal it and copy manually.

schedule.title: Course schedule
schedule.subtitle: Every session for this course. Edit sessions from setup.

empty.title: No sessions yet
empty.reason: Add sessions in the course setup schedule step.

enrollment.title: Enrollment
enrollment.subtitle: Control who can join this course and review who has enrolled.

pendingBanner.title: {count, plural, one {# student is awaiting approval} other {# students are awaiting approval}}
pendingBanner.reason: Review and approve join requests to add them to the roster.

access.codeHint: Students can join instantly with the code.
access.approvalHint: Requests need your approval before joining.

roster.title: Class roster
roster.description: See every student who has joined this course.

requests.title: Join requests
requests.description: Approve or deny students waiting to join.

roster.title: Class roster
roster.subtitle: Students who joined this course with the enrollment code.

empty.title: No students yet
empty.reason: Share the enrollment code so students can join this course.

join.title: Join a course
join.subtitle: Enter the code shown by your instructor.

code.label: Course code
code.hint: Ask your instructor to confirm the join code.
code.lookupError: We couldn't check that code. Please try again.

invalid.title: This code is invalid or inactive
invalid.reasonNotFound: We couldn't find a course for that code. Check for typos and try again.
invalid.reasonInactive: This join code is no longer active. Ask your instructor for a current code.

shortPreview.noDescription: Your instructor hasn't added a description yet.
shortPreview.notOpenReason: You can join once your instructor opens course access. You can still review the readiness steps now.
shortPreview.errorReason: The preview is unavailable right now. Check your code and try again.

phase.loadingReason: Fetching the readiness questions for this course.
phase.errorReason: Something went wrong submitting this step. Please try again.

diagnostic.skipReason: Your instructor hasn't set up a diagnostic task, so you can move straight to your recommendation.

recommendation.body: Based on your ready check, here's a suggested starting point.
recommendation.errorReason: Something went wrong computing your recommendation. Please try again.

deepPreview.notOpenReason: The full course preview opens once your instructor publishes the course. You can still continue and join when it's ready.
deepPreview.errorTitle: We couldn't load the full preview
deepPreview.errorReason: The detailed preview is unavailable right now. You can still continue.

summary.title: You're ready to join
summary.body: Here's what you've completed. Join the course to get started.
summary.noPhases: No readiness steps were required for this course.
summary.errorReason: Your readiness summary is unavailable right now. Please try again.

pending.title: Waiting for instructor approval
pending.reason: Your request to join {course} was sent. You'll get access once your instructor approves it.

notOpen.title: Course not open yet
notOpen.reason: {course} isn't ready for student access yet. You'll be able to join once your instructor publishes it — check back when access opens.

join.joinError: We couldn't complete your join. Please try again.
